name: Francisco Mela
abstract: Francisco Jose Mela is a Cuban drummer and percussionist who has performed with a wide array of prominent international Latin and jazz artists including Kenny Barron, Gary Bartz, JoAnne Brackeen, Jane Bunnett, Regina Carter, Anat Cohen, Paquito D'Rivera, George Garzone, Larry Grenadier, Stefon Harris, Lionel Loueke, Joe Lovano, Jason Mor…

about_quotes.speaker: Kenny Barron
about_quotes.evidence: We worked together for a while, over maybe two years, something like that.
about_quotes.doc_title: Kenny Barron — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
